name: Jojoba Oil
description: A lightweight wax ester that closely mimics human sebum.
scientificSummary: Tricks the skin into thinking it has produced enough oil, thus balancing sebum levels.
mechanismOfAction: Tricks the skin into thinking it has produced enough oil, thus balancing sebum levels.
